name: branches-family
description: The Branches family battery: regularity, monophyly, clean outgroup, inventory closure, divergence magnitude/reality, and merger-induced homophony over the goblinoid family (goblin, hobgoblin, bugbear) against the kobold outgroup, seed-swept over 1,000 worlds (spec §3, Task 10) — so the family properties hold as all-seed invariants, not seed-42 facts.
